summary: Made a surgical seam pass by linking the opening more directly to Chapter 6's final on-train round and by sharpening the closing image around Marisol's downgraded access and isolation to hand off cleanly into Chapter 8.
edits: Reframed the opening sentence to bridge directly from Marisol's last round in the hot cars into her arrival at Caldera Junction.
Adjusted the closing paragraph to foreground Marisol's downgraded card and the tier-three door as the chapter exits.
